2344.why: 165 = the old July low / broken support, reclaiming it kills the post-crash bear case; 150 = under the 07-17 crash close, losing it opens air to the 136.5 zone top

2337.why: 136.5 = top of the broken 132.5-136.5 MSL/resistance band, reclaiming it restores the recovery case; 120 = below the 07-17 low, confirms free-fall with no volume support beneath

6770.why: 63 = breaks the 63.4 July MSL, nothing beneath until the 56.6-59.1 zone; 75 = back into the post-earnings-call range, says the crash was the flush and the earnings story reasserts

NVDA.why: 198 = under the 188.9-197.6 zone top that caught Friday's low to the tick — losing it turns the failed breakout into a short setup; 214 = clears the 213.99 MSH, opens the 216.8 zone top

1307.why: 34.0 = reclaim of the broken MSL (33.85); 31.5 = decisively inside the 30.65-31.85 zone, trend flip confirmed

AAPL.why: 318 = under the 07-15 breakout base (~317), ends the five-day momentum leg; 335 = extension above the 334.99 weekly high into fresh record territory

SPCX.why: 120 = under the 07-17 low (122.12), opens the low-110s with only round numbers beneath; 135 = reclaim of the IPO price, flips the broken-IPO read back to neutral
